title: VxRail vSAN Storage Policy Compliance Check Results
app: vSAN health service JSON with per-VM compliance
spl:
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:vsan" earliest=-6h
| eval cs=lower(compliance_state)
| where cs!="compliant"
| stats count as viol, values(policy) as policies by vm_name, cluster_id
description: Noncompliant objects may lack required FTT during maintenance. This is a leading indicator of impending rebuild stress.
value: Ensures data durability matches advertised SLAs before node removals.
implementation: Poll compliance after disk or host events. Alert on any noncompliant production VM. Automate owner notification with remediation KB.
visualization: Bar chart by policy; table VMs; trend violations.
grandmaExplanation: We keep an eye on vxRail vSAN Storage Policy Compliance Check Results and raise the alarm before it drags down real work or real outages start.
knownFalsePositives: IGEL and endpoint UMS health can warn during bulk firmware, certificate rotation, or when a single site loses WAN; use device cohorts to separate local noise from UMS issues.
